mapper.update: UPDATE product SET seckill_stock = seckill_stock - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND seckill_stock > 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, seckill_stock as seckillStock, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM product WHERE seckill_stock > 0
SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, seckill_stock as seckillStock, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM product
